name: set_feishu_sheet_values
description: Writes values to a cell range. Existing values in the range are overwritten.

range.description: Cell range in A1 notation (required). Examples: "A1:C10" (active sheet), "{sheetId}!A1:C10" (specific sheet by ID), "Sheet1!A1:C10" (specific sheet by title). For multi-sheet spreadsheets, always prefix with sheetId or sheet title to avoid ambiguity.

values.description: 2D array of cell values (required). Each inner array represents a row.

valueInputOption.description: How the input data should be interpreted. USER_ENTERED: formulas/parsing applied; RAW: stored as-is.
